description: Choose one of the following writing tasks and write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.title: Shopping with friends
tasks.prompt: You see this announcement in an English-language magazine.||Articles wanted!||Shopping with friends||Do you enjoy going shopping with your friends?||What shops do you like visiting most?||Write your article.
tasks.modelAnswer: Shopping with friends||I really enjoy going shopping with my friends because it is more fun than going alone. We usually go on Saturday afternoons, when we have finished our homework. I like visiting clothes shops most because I enjoy trying on different things, even if I do not buy anything.||The best part is that my friends always give me honest advice. Sometimes we also go to a café afterwards and talk about school or music.||In my opinion, shopping is not only about spending money. It is also a good way to relax and spend time with people you like.

tasks.title: Story
tasks.prompt: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.||Your story must begin with this sentence:||When I opened the front door, I saw a small box on the ground.||Write your story.
tasks.startingSentence: When I opened the front door, I saw a small box on the ground.
tasks.modelAnswer: When I opened the front door, I saw a small box on the ground. At first, I thought it was for my parents, but my name was written on it. I carried it inside and opened it carefully.||Inside the box, there was an old key and a short note. The note said, “Go to the garden and look under the big tree.” I felt nervous, but I went outside.||Under the tree, I found my birthday present: a new bike. My family was hiding behind the garage, laughing. It was the best surprise I had ever had.
